Notes: Create New Type for GetParticipants API. The requirement from our sites is that they have a type within the Get Participants API which would return only participants who have had some kind of refusal or withdrawal; Variable added on 3/30/23; Previously revised on 4/13/23; Revised notes: HdRef_AnyRefOrWd_v1r0 (451953807) is a default variable that is saved to every participant record when the record is created and it is given a default value of 'No' (104430631) upon initialization. If deceased (987563196) = yes (353358909), then HdRef_AnyRefOrWd_v1r0 (451953807) will be set to yes (353358909) when derived variables are recalculated (4/2/26)
